Amended Notice Of Motion To Quash, Limit And/Or Modify Subpoenas Issued By Deft. City And County Of San Francisco For The Release Of Plntf'S Employment Records
Off Calendar Jul-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Jennifer L. Fiore, JD, for Plaintiff and moving party: Jason Sanders
James Hannawalt, Deputy City Attorney, for Defendant and opposing party: City and County of San Francisco

After hearing, Plaintiff Jason Sanders' Motion to quash limit and/or modify subpoenas issued for the release of plaintiff's employment records is Granted in Part to permit the release of employment information limited to payroll records, attendance records, and medical records pertinent to plaintiff's absence from work due to the injuries alleged in the instant action and without prejudice to future further discovery if other methods are ineffective. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
